title: Hwruarca
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Hwruarca.jpg]] |name=Hwruarca |homeworld=[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] and purple |feathers= |eyes=Hazel |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Shoartu]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You are to face the champion."
"Let me pass."
"May the forest spirits grant you blessings.|Hwruarca and a Kerritamba Village Arena contestant|}} '''Hwruarca''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] member of the [[Shoartu]] tribe of the [[Kerritamba Village]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. By the time following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], she and [[Rhylis]] worked as arena guards at the [[Kerritamba Village Arena]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|You have not been deemed worthy enough to enter the Arena.|Hwruarca, to an unworthy passerby|}} A [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] by the name of Hwruarca lived during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. She resided on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] among her fellow Wookiees in the [[Shoartu]] tribe of the [[Kerritamba Village]]. By the time following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' she and a fellow male Wookiee by the name of [[Rhylis]] had been assigned the role of arena guards, tasked with the responsibility of guarding the [[Kerritamba Village Arena]]. Hwruarca guarded the entrance to the arena, while Rhylis guarded the exit. {{Gamemechanics|Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees}} Hwruarca allowed at least one contestant to enter the arena, in order to face [[Shoartu Arena Champion]] [[Wirartu]] in combat. {{Endgame}} ==Equipment== During her time as an arena guard, Hwruarca wore a brown and gray [[Color/Legends|colored]] Wookiee [[Clothing/Legends|battle padding]]. ==Behind the scenes== Hwruarca was a non-player character in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'', a [[2005]] [[W:c:swg:Expansion|expansion pack]] to [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Roleplaying game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].{{GalaxiesAED}}{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Hwruarca was featured in a [[W:c:swg:Quest|quest]] titled "[[W:c:swg:Arena Challenge: Face Wirartu|Arena Challenge: Face Wirartu]]," in which players were tasked with defeating Wirartu in [[W:c:swg:Combat|combat]]. In order to do so, players had to speak with Hwruarca to enter the arena. In the [[W:c:swg:Star Wars Galaxies|game's]] directory tree files and source data, Hwruarca's name is listed as '''Hwroarca''' (an Arena Guardian).''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' directory tree files and source data However, this alternative name was not used in the game, and is therefore considered [[Canon|non-canon]] in [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Hwruarca}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Guards]] [[Category:Kashyyyk residents]] [[Category:Wookiees]]
